notes: Per-student roster. Each student logs in with their personal password and gets greeted by name. The schedule field is a free-text string used by the home page; format is '<Day> <HH:MM> · <Topic> / <Day> <HH:MM> · <Topic>'.

anna.name: Anna
anna.schedule: Friday 19:00 · Module 2, Lesson 3 / Tuesday 18:00 · Module 2, Lesson 4

narine.name: Narine
narine.schedule: Wednesday 20:00 · Module 4, Lesson 1 / Friday 19:00 · Module 4, Lesson 2

anush.name: Anush
anush.schedule: Friday 19:00 · Module 2, Lesson 3 / Sunday 17:00 · Module 2, Lesson 4

fallback.name: learner
fallback.note: Old shared password still works as a fallback so existing students don't get locked out during the migration.
